# Ajay Sachdev
> Finance & Operations Manager at a B2B SaaS scale-up. CIMA part-qualified. Builds AI systems, Power BI dashboards, and financial models. Python, SQL, FAISS, RAG. Based in the UK.

## Background
- Sindhi family from Mumbai — grew up in a textile business (est. 1988)
- B.Com, Jai Hind College, Mumbai (2015-18)
- Chartered Wealth Management (AAFM)
- MSc Finance, Loughborough University (2020-21, 2:1)
- CIMA part-qualified (expected May 2026)
- Started as intern (Oct 2021), now sole finance & ops function across UK, US, Pakistan
- School Governor at a 250-pupil primary school

## Projects
- Ajay Brain: Agentic AI system — 9,000 lines Python, 15 API integrations, 6,124 docs indexed, 100% search accuracy
- Trading Bot: Algorithmic FTSE 100 trading — 20 tickers, zero leverage, Claude-powered risk auditor
- Uni-Nation (uni-nation.in): Family textile business website

## Key Metrics
- £5M+ seed & Series A funding supported
- 50+ Power BI dashboards built
- 7 multi-currency bank accounts managed (GBP, USD, PKR)
- 3 entities (UK, US, Pakistan)
- 40+ hours/month saved through automation
- WiFi costs reduced 50%, electricity 74%, software 30%+

## Skills
Financial Modelling, Management Accounts, VAT & Payroll, Budgeting & Forecasting, Power BI, SQL, Python, GA4, Firebase, FAISS, RAG, BM25, GPT-4o, Claude, Xero, HubSpot, Factorial, Contract Drafting
